name: Noir (MEGAMAN X OC)
description:
A non-binary albino Reploid with frostbites on their cheeks. Known as one of the powerful Mavericks among 8 others. Wears a black tuxedo over his black armor, matched with a white jabot and blue hair tie.

Don’t let their kind appearance fool you, however...Or their saviour complex. He truly loves to boggle minds, after all.

Mega Man X OC. Uses he/they/snow pronouns.
creator: W1NT3RLYN01R
